creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text: Did you try to build this port with your tarball in a clean jail, e.g. poudriere or tinderbox? It will fail due to missing bash. bash and gmake dependencies should be removed for non-maintainer users. It took me more-than-expected hours to investigate build failure in maintainer section. Anyway, it's finished now. This port is updated to 1.4.25 with fixed maintainer section now. Thanks.
